function vector apply(vector x) { matrix M = matrix_literal(vector_literal(1.0, 0.0, 0.0), vector_literal(0.0, 1.0, 0.0), vector_literal(0.0, 0.0, 1.0)); return Tensor.MatrixMul(M, x); }
function string main() { return "ok"; }

function vector apply(vector x) { matrix M = matrix_literal(vector_literal(2.0, 0.0), vector_literal(0.0, 3.0)); return Tensor.MatrixMul(M, x); }
function string main() { return "ok"; }

function vector apply(vector x) { vector v1 = vector_literal(1.0, 2.0); vector v2 = vector_literal(3.0, 4.0); return v1 + v2; }
function string main() { return "ok"; }

function vector apply(vector x) { matrix M = matrix_literal(vector_literal(0.5, 0.5), vector_literal(0.5, 0.5)); return Tensor.MatrixMul(M, x); }
function string main() { return "ok"; }

function vector apply(vector x) { vector v1 = vector_literal(1.0, 1.0, 1.0); return 2.0 * v1; }
function string main() { return "ok"; }

function vector apply(vector x) { matrix M = matrix_literal(vector_literal(1.0, 2.0), vector_literal(3.0, 4.0)); return Tensor.MatrixMul(M, x); }
function string main() { return "ok"; }

function vector apply(vector x) { vector v1 = vector_literal(1.0, 2.0, 3.0); vector v2 = vector_literal(4.0, 5.0, 6.0); return v1 - v2; }
function string main() { return "ok"; }

function vector apply(vector x) { matrix M = matrix_literal(vector_literal(0.0, 1.0), vector_literal(1.0, 0.0)); return Tensor.MatrixMul(M, x); }
function string main() { return "ok"; }
